title: Salty Onion Uruguayan Rings
description: These whole30-friendly onion rings feature a crispy exterior and savory inside, perfect for a light lunch or snack during the monsoon season.
instructions: Slice the whole grain bread into thin rings and toast until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Drain the onion rings, leaving any excess oil. Pat them dry with paper towels to remove moisture.
Place the toasted bread circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush both sides of the toasted bread and the drained onion rings with olive oil. Season generously with sea salt.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
